ListL2BucketLink.action: The action for this API is fixed as ListL2BucketLink
ListL2BucketLink.maxKeys: Maximum number of bucket links to return. Defaults to 20. Valid range is [1, 20]; values outside the range are clamped to 1 or 20
ListL2BucketLink.manner: Pagination type for the request. The marker parameter must be specified
ListL2BucketLink.marker: Results are sorted by bucketlinkId (typically in the format "dflow-xxxxxx") in lexicographical order. Returns entries starting from the first one after the specified marker (exclusive)
